aboutPage.body: Matjar is Lebanon's local commerce platform — one place that brings together stores, products, and services, helping business owners reach their customers with ease. Our goal is to make local shopping and booking faster and simpler, and to give every merchant their own online store in minutes.

contactPage.intro: For inquiries or support, reach out — we reply as soon as possible.

faq.title: Help & FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Matjar.

items.q: How do I order a product?
items.a: Open a store or product, add it to the cart, tap "Order", fill in your address and phone, and confirm. The order reaches the merchant instantly and you can track it under "My orders". Payment is cash on delivery.

items.q: How do I open my store?
items.a: Tap "Open your store", pick your business type, fill in your store name and details, and add products. Your store is ready in minutes with a short link and QR code to share.
Zero commission on sales — the customer, their number, and the profit are all yours. There's an optional Pro plan ($12/mo) for higher visibility, analytics, and a verified badge.
A classifieds section where any user can post listings — buy and sell easily. You can save a search and get notified the moment a matching listing appears.
From your account page tap "Enable notifications" and allow your browser. You'll get order updates, the daily deal, and saved-search matches — even when the site is closed.
Currently cash on delivery, with the option to contact and order directly via WhatsApp with the merchant.
